description_long: This is a modern bathroom vanity and storage cabinet set, featuring a double-sink countertop with two faucets and a combination of closed and open shelving. The main vanity unit has two large cabinet doors beneath the sinks, likely concealing plumbing and storage space, while the right side includes three open shelves for easy access to toiletries or towels. The accompanying tall cabinet has a minimalist design with a closed upper and lower section and an open middle shelf, suitable for storing larger items or decorative pieces. The surfaces are predominantly white with light wood accents, giving the set a clean, contemporary look. The materials appear to be a mix of laminated wood or MDF and ceramic or composite for the sinks. This set is designed for functional storage and organization in a bathroom or similar urban interior.
description: A modern double-sink bathroom vanity with a matching tall storage cabinet, featuring white surfaces and light wood accents, with both closed and open shelving.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the tall cabinet and a partial profile of the vanity unit.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the double sinks, cabinet doors, open shelves, and the tall storage cabinet with an open middle section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the depth of the vanity and the tall cabinet's profile.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the plumbing under the sinks and the back panels of both the vanity and tall cabinet.
